headline: Unpacking Q1 Earnings: Charter (NASDAQ:CHTR) In The Context Of Other Consumer Discretionary - Wireless, Cable and Satellite Stocks
summary: Looking back on consumer discretionary - wireless, cable and satellite stocks’ Q1 earnings, we examine this quarter’s best and worst performers, including Charter (NASDAQ:CHTR) and its peers.
